name: PM Internship Scheme
description: Internship opportunities for youth to gain practical experience with Indian MSMEs and government-linked organizations.
benefits: Paid internship and skill development; potential certificate of completion.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (Urban) - CLSS
description: Credit Linked Subsidy Scheme (CLSS) under PMAY-U to provide interest subsidy for affordable housing loans.
benefits: Interest subsidy on housing loans; lower EMI burden.

name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
description: Health insurance scheme providing cashless benefits for eligible beneficiaries.
benefits: Up to 5 lakh rupees health coverage annually; cashless treatment.

name: Scholarship Scheme for Students with Disabilities (SSPD)
description: Financial assistance for students with disabilities to support education and living expenses.
benefits: Scholarship amount for tuition and disability-related support.

name: PM-KISAN
description: Direct income support to eligible farmer families to improve financial stability.
benefits: INR 6,000 per year in three installments.

name: Ujjwala Yojana
description: Financial assistance for eligible households to obtain LPG connections for cleaner cooking.
benefits: LPG connection with support for cylinder, regulator, and stove.

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Central Schemes
description: Central and state scholarship schemes administered via the National Scholarship Portal.
benefits: Scholarship for tuition, maintenance and other allowances (varies by scheme).

name: Startup India Seed Fund (SISF)
description: Seed support for startups to validate innovation and build early products.
benefits: Grant support and mentorship for eligible startups.

name: PM Formalization of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PM Formalisation of MFPO)
description: Support for micro food processing enterprises to improve formalization and operations.
benefits: Assistance for formalization, training, and capacity building.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM) - Individual Household Latrine (IHHL)
description: Financial assistance and support for household toilets to improve sanitation.
benefits: Subsidy for toilet construction and related support (as per eligibility).

name: Skill India - PMKVY (Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana)
description: Government skill training scheme for youth with job-oriented certification.
benefits: Training, certification, and placement support (varies by batch).

name: Ayushman Bharat - SEHAT (Hospital Enrollment)
description: Enrollment and operational framework for hospitals and beneficiaries to access SEHAT services.
benefits: Access to empanelled health services.

name: DRDO Technology Development Fund (TDF)
description: Funding support to develop technologies through DRDO-approved pathways.
benefits: Grants for technology development and commercialization readiness.

name: National Pension System (NPS) - Contribution Assistance
description: Assistance and guidance for eligible citizens to join NPS and secure retirement.
benefits: Retirement corpus building and tax benefits (as per rules).

name: e-Shram (Unorganised Workers Registration)
description: Registration platform for unorganised workers to access social security schemes.
benefits: Identification number and access to welfare schemes.

name: National Education Scholarship Scheme (NESA) - State/Center Mix
description: Scholarship support for meritorious students across education levels.
benefits: Scholarship amount for tuition and academic support.

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (Crop Insurance)
description: Crop insurance scheme to protect farmers from losses due to natural calamities.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crops during notified season.

name: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC) - Portability
description: Support for portability of ration across states using Aadhaar-linked ration cards.
benefits: Ration availability in home and destination states (as per eligibility).

name: National Scheme for Promotion of Employment through Skill Training (NAPS-SKILL)
description: Skill training and placement support for unemployed youth.
benefits: Training stipends and job assistance (varies by program).

name: PM-SVANidhi (Street Vendor Support)
description: Collateral-free working capital loans for street vendors to restart and grow businesses.
benefits: Loan up to a set limit; repayment in instalments (scheme rules apply).
